description: A flight carrying a school group has been cancelled. An agent must rebook the entire group together on a new flight.

nodes.task_description: Identify the cancelled flight and retrieve the group booking associated with it.
Search for alternative flights that have enough available seats to accommodate the entire group.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a later flight with enough seats.

nodes.task_description: Rebook the entire group onto the new flight and ensure they are still seated together.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully rebooks the group and assigns them seats together on the new flight.
